prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform it into an ornate Japanese Rinpa-school decorative painting style while preserving the woman’s pose, proportions, outfit silhouette, anonymized face block, and overall framing. Replace the modern office/window background with a lavish gold-leaf folding-screen composition. Add 5 main decorative motif groups: 1) textured gold and silver leaf cloud shapes, 2) flowing deep-blue stylized water with gold wave lines, 3) purple irises with long green leaves on the left and lower foreground, 4) pale cherry blossoms on branches in the upper right, and 5) layered white, gold, and muted floral clusters around the lower and right edges. Integrate the same Rinpa motifs onto the navy dress and white blouse as if painted or gilded on the fabric, especially gold floral sprays and wave patterns, while keeping the subject photorealistic enough to match the reference. Use rich metallic texture, elegant Japanese screen-painting ornamentation, dense decorative layering, and a harmonious gold, navy, ivory, green, and violet palette.
